name: Low-Fat Glazed Chicken in Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the thawed orange juice concentrate (not regular orange juice) with the marjoram, garlic powder, and nutmeg in a bowl.
2. Split the chicken breasts to make 6 serving sizes. Dip each piece into the orange juice mixture to coat completely. Place the coated pieces in the crockpot.
3. Pour the remaining orange juice mixture over the chicken.
4. Cover and cook on low for 7-9 hours, or cook on high for 4 hours if desired. Precise cooking time is not important in crockpot cooking.
5. When the chicken is done, remove it to a serving platter. Pour the sauce remaining in the crockpot into a saucepan.
6. Mix the cornstarch and water in a separate bowl. Stir this mixture into the juice in the saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly until thick and bubbly.
7. Serve the sauce over the chicken.
